figures.caption: Fig. 1: Overview of our framework for evaluating building conditions.
Fig. 2: Examples of buildings corresponding to each condition rating.
Fig. 4: Overview of the visualization dashboard, which integrates building-level property review, parcellevel map context, and city-scale comparison views in a unified interface.

Fig. 5: Example dashboard views for LLM-based building assessment: the analysis tabs provide a compact summary of model outputs, while the report view presents detailed evaluation results for the selected property.
Fig. 3: Attribute-label distributions for GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.6 after majority voting across five runs.
